name: ruixen-smart-paste-input
title: Ruixen Smart Paste Input
author: Ruixen UI
description: Captures long pasted text as editable caller-owned attachments inside an accessible message composer.

changes: Repointed the source utility import to the copied Ruixen utility subset.
Bounded the autosizing input, added explicit non-submit button types, replaced transition-all, and disabled positional hover motion under reduced motion.
Kept the source shadcn button, dialog, and textarea dependencies explicit as registry dependencies.
Copied only the source cn helper and its clsx and tailwind-merge imports, omitting unrelated application metadata, environment, fetch, date, and text helpers.

license.scope: registry/ruixenui/smart-paste-input.tsx and the cn subset of lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Made the copied composer safe inside forms, bounded its autosizing input, and narrowed its transitions with reduced-motion fallbacks.
modifications.reason: Preserve the source long-paste workflow while preventing accidental parent form submits and indiscriminate or unwanted movement.

modifications.change: Reduced the source application utility file to the exact cn closure used by the component.
modifications.reason: Avoid shipping unrelated Next-specific application code while preserving the source class-merging behavior.
